content.subject: Re: Unable to configure SMTP relay for my domain

body.text:
Hi Jane,

Great to hear that you've added your IP range to the whitelist!

IP whitelist propagation typically takes just around 15 minutes to complete. Please wait for about 15 minutes and then try your SMTP relay connection again.

If you continue to experience authentication errors after that time, please let us know and we can investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team
body.html:
Hi Jane,

Great to hear that you've added your IP range to the whitelist!

IP whitelist propagation typically takes just around 15 minutes to complete. Please wait for about 15 minutes and then try your SMTP relay connection again.

If you continue to experience authentication errors after that time, please let us know and we can investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team

content.subject: Re: Unable to configure SMTP relay for my domain

body.text:
Hi Jane,

Thanks for adding the IP range to the whitelist. The propagation of IP whitelist changes typically completes within 15 minutes. Please wait for that time and then try configuring the SMTP relay again.

If you still encounter the authentication error, feel free to let us know.

Best regards,
Support Team

expected_params.name: Fix NY-BOS Congestion - Phase 1
expected_params.description: Reroute 20% of non-critical traffic from the congested primary link (CR-London-Primary-04 -> ES-Manchester-Agg-01) to the secondary link via CR-London-Secondary-02. business_case.justification: High SLA penalty risk of $45,000 total, with $15,000 immediately at risk for FinTech Global Ltd. Active incident inc_8821_net_slow is correlated with this congestion. Rerouting 20% non-critical traffic will reduce utilization from 94.2% to ~75%, bringing latency back within SLA thresholds.
Redirect non-critical traffic to secondary link to avoid SLA penalties (~$45k/month) and improve network stability.

content.subject: [Incident INC-2024-0821-A1] Service Degradation - us-east-1 Region
content.body_text:
Dear Customer,

We are currently experiencing a service degradation affecting connectivity in the us-east-1 region (North Virginia / DC Metro). Our team is actively working to mitigate the issue.

Impact Details:
- Region: us-east-1 (POP-EQX-ASH1, POP-EQX-NYC1)
- Issue: Partial outage affecting Layer 2 Virtual Circuits and Cloud Exchange Direct Connect
- Root Cause: Upstream fiber utility cut

Actions Taken:
- We are proactively rerouting affected traffic through secondary gateways
- Engaging with upstream fiber provider for repair ETA

We will provide further updates as they become available. Thank you for your patience.

Regards,
TaaS Operations Team

expected_params.summary: Corrected affected region from APAC to us-east-1 based on scope analysis
expected_params.details: Initial incident creation indicated APAC region as affected. Scope analysis confirmed actual impact is in us-east-1 (North Virginia / DC Metro), affecting sites POP-EQX-ASH1 and POP-EQX-NYC1.

risk_assessment.risk_description: Rerouting to secondary gateway may introduce additional latency but will restore connectivity for high-impact customer
risk_assessment.fallback_plan: Roll back to primary path if secondary path performance is unacceptable

risk_assessment.risk_description: Potential brief disruption during path switchover.
risk_assessment.fallback_plan: If the new path fails, revert to original path using the same configuration.

expected_params.issue_summary: iPhone 13 突然死机无法开机
expected_params.issue_details: 客户报告iPhone 13在使用过程中频繁卡顿（hang），昨天突然黑屏关机，之后无法再开机。客户确认没有摔过也没有进水，设备一直正常使用。购买时间约为2022年中。设备IMEI暂时无法确认（手机已无法开机，包装盒也找不到）。

reported_device.damage_description: 非物理损坏 - 设备突然死机黑屏无法开机，无摔碰或进水迹象
No physical damage (no drops or water exposure)

predicted_params.issue_details: The device started hanging during normal use, then displayed a black screen and would no longer power on. No physical damage or exposure to water. Purchased in June 2022, approximately 18 months ago. The issue appears to be hardware failure.
